primary_skills: ML pipeline development and model integration, 5yr, active
RAG / LLM integration / Prompt Engineering, 3yr, active
anti_preferences: no pure frontend roles (React / Vue / Angular only — no backend component)
no QA or test engineer roles
no pure DevOps or sysadmin roles with no software development scope
no junior or associate level positions
no roles requiring active C++ as the primary language
no architect or technical lead positions with no individual contributor scope
location_preference: remote, or on-site / hybrid in South Florida (Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Broward County)
scoring_notes: Senior-level roles are strongly preferred. If two roles are otherwise equal, a Senior role should score 1-2 points higher than a Mid-level role.
Mid-level roles are acceptable and should not be excluded, but must be noted in concerns with a message like 'Mid-level role — may be a step down in seniority'.
A Mid-level role with excellent technical fit (8+ skill matches, strong industry alignment) can still score 7-8. A Senior role with weaker fit should not automatically outscore it.
